description: Style Note Durable, versatile, uniquely designed and reasonably priced, these fashionable jeans from locomotive are designed for the man with a high fashion casual attitude. Crafted from durable cotton fabric, these denims are here to stay and offer exemplary comfort. Pair them with a semi-formal shirt or a tee, and sports shoes. Product Details Blue jeans with a slightly washed look, has a buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops on the waistband, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket inside the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detailing and a crumpled look Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Super slim fit The model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32 Style NoteDurable, versatile, uniquely designed and reasonably priced, these fashionable jeans from Locomotive are designed for the man with a high fashion casual attitude.
